category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Uganda market under the UNBS PVoC scheme.

title.en: China-to-Uganda LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Uganda market-access requirements: mandatory UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and Certificate of Conformity, UNBS Q-Mark / import inspection, US/IEC-based safety standards (IEC 60598, IEC 62560, IEC 62471), energy-efficiency labelling programmes, and UCC type approval for radio-enabled smart lighting, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与乌干达市场准入要求差距对照：强制性 UNBS 出口前符合性验证（PVoC）及符合性证书、UNBS Q 标志/进口检验、基于美标/IEC 的安全标准（IEC 60598、IEC 62560、IEC 62471）、能效标识方案，以及面向无线智能照明的 UCC 型号核准，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與烏干達市場准入要求差距對照：強制性 UNBS 出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）及符合性證書、UNBS Q 標誌/進口檢驗、基於美標/IEC 的安全標準（IEC 60598、IEC 62560、IEC 62471）、能效標識方案，以及面向無線智能照明的 UCC 型號核准，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Uganda law, the UNBS PVoC programme scope and applicable standards list, energy-efficiency requirements, and UCC type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the appointed PVoC inspection body before shipment or import.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或进口前，应与合格专业人士及指定的 PVoC 检验机构核验现行乌干达法律、UNBS PVoC 方案范围及适用标准清单、能效要求及 UCC 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或進口前，應與合格專業人士及指定的 PVoC 檢驗機構核驗現行烏干達法律、UNBS PVoC 方案範圍及適用標準清單、能效要求及 UCC 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Uganda must meet the UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme: each regulated consignment requires a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by a UNBS-appointed inspection body before shipment, obtained via Route A (consignment testing), Route B (registration), or Route C (licensing) — without a valid CoC the goods can be detained, fined, or re-exported at the Mombasa or Dar es Salaam port of entry (Uganda is landlocked). LED luminaires are assessed against US/IEC-based safety standards (IEC 60598 luminaire safety, IEC 62560 self-ballasted LED lamps, IEC 62471 photobiological safety) rather than EN harmonised standards; the product must be rated for the 240 V / 50 Hz Uganda grid (50 Hz matches China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). An in-country importer of record handles clearance and may need the UNBS Q-Mark / import inspection for products on the regulated list. Energy-efficiency labelling applies under Uganda's national programmes where in scope, and any radio-enabled smart luminaire (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) additionally needs UCC type approval. Uganda does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS, REACH-SVHC, or Ecodesign regime — those obligations have no direct Uganda counterpart. Existing CCC certification does not satisfy the UNBS PVoC pathway.
answer_first.zh: 向乌干达出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须满足 UNBS 出口前符合性验证（PVoC）方案：每批受管制货物在出货前均须取得 UNBS 指定检验机构签发的符合性证书（CoC），可通过路径 A（逐批检测）、路径 B（注册）或路径 C（许可）获得——无有效 CoC 的货物可能在蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆入境口岸被扣留、罚款或退运（乌干达为内陆国）。LED 灯具依据基于美标/IEC 的安全标准评估（IEC 60598 灯具安全、IEC 62560 自镇流 LED 灯、IEC 62471 光生物安全），而非欧盟 EN 协调标准；产品须适配乌干达 240 V / 50 Hz 电网（50 Hz 与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）。境内进口商负责清关，受管制清单产品可能需要 UNBS Q 标志/进口检验。在适用范围内，乌干达国家能效标识方案适用；任何无线智能灯具（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）还须取得 UCC 型号核准。乌干达不实行欧盟式的横向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或生态设计制度——上述义务在乌干达无直接对应。现有 CCC 认证不满足 UNBS PVoC 路径。
answer_first.zht: 向烏干達出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須滿足 UNBS 出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）方案：每批受管制貨物在出貨前均須取得 UNBS 指定檢驗機構簽發的符合性證書（CoC），可通過路徑 A（逐批檢測）、路徑 B（注冊）或路徑 C（許可）獲得——無有效 CoC 的貨物可能在蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆入境口岸被扣留、罰款或退運（烏干達為內陸國）。LED 燈具依據基於美標/IEC 的安全標準評估（IEC 60598 燈具安全、IEC 62560 自鎮流 LED 燈、IEC 62471 光生物安全），而非歐盟 EN 協調標準；產品須適配烏干達 240 V / 50 Hz 電網（50 Hz 與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）。境內進口商負責清關，受管制清單產品可能需要 UNBS Q 標誌/進口檢驗。在適用範圍內，烏干達國家能效標識方案適用；任何無線智能燈具（Wi-Fi/藍牙）還須取得 UCC 型號核准。烏干達不實行歐盟式的橫向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或生態設計制度——上述義務在烏干達無直接對應。現有 CCC 認證不滿足 UNBS PVoC 路徑。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, plus on any change to the UNBS PVoC standards list, applicable IEC editions, or UCC type-approval scope
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. UNBS PVoC routes, applicable IEC/US standard references, and energy-labelling scope must be re-verified against the current UNBS programme documentation and the appointed PVoC inspection body on each review cycle.
